title: Fukrey Boyzzz
subTitle: The school launches a new initiative to teach the students about ethical journalism. The kids compete with each other to become good reporters.

title: Fukrey Boyzzz
subTitle: Choocha, Hunny and Laali chase their bold and lofty aspirations. However, they find themselves competing with the ruthless Bholi Punjaban, who relentlessly plots to thwart their progress.

title: Kris Roll No 21
subTitle: As Kanishk continues to lose to Kris despite all his evil plans, Guru Mahasur sends for the cunning Heemka, Kanishk's old enemy from school.

title: Little Krishna
subTitle: When Lord Indra learns that the people of Vrindavan do not worship him enough, he exacts his wrath by sending torrential rains that engulf the village. But Krishna steps in to protect the people.

title: Haddi Mera Buddy
subTitle: Haddi transports Billy and Irwin to a real life version of their favourite video game, in order to cure their gaming addiction.

title: Little Singham
subTitle: A mystical prism discovered by Shambala unleashes seven powerful demons upon Mirchinagar. As a result, Little Singham races against time to formulate a strategy to vanquish the evil entities.

title: Little Singham
subTitle: Little Singham and Mantriji journey to the annual boat race festival for a fun-filled day. However, their plans are disrupted when the villainous Yamma Yamma Yappan plots to snatch the coveted trophy.

title: Little Singham
subTitle: Little Singham, an honest but ferocious police officer, fights against injustice and defends his town from formidable enemies.

subTitle: Simmba, an honest and courageous police officer, teams up with his fearless colleagues in his mission to confront and defeat the evil forces of society.

title: Baby Little Singham
subTitle: A horde of coconut monsters pour out of the portal and onto the beach. So, baby Little Singham and the rest of the gang run around chasing and catching these hairy little monsters.

title: Baby Little Singham
subTitle: While the gang are having fun at the beach, a pirate ship appears from the portal. So, baby Little Singham springs into action to defend the beach against the skeleton pirate crew.

title: Baby Little Singham
subTitle: With the skeleton pirates still attacking the beach, Baby Little Singham gets some help from a baby langur monkey and his friends in fending off the attack.

title: Baby Little Singham
subTitle: Chaos ensues when the evil Octo comes out of the portal with a submarine loaded with weapons to attack baby Little Singham and the rest of the gang.

title: Baby Little Singham
subTitle: Maha Shark once again manages to escape from the portal and sets his plan to get rid of the gang in motion. But the gang comes up with their own plan to force Maha Shark back into the portal.

title: Baby Little Singham
subTitle: At the beach, Baby Little Singham spots a hermit crab with a beautiful seashell. Soon he tries to trick and steal the seashell from the crab while it fights back.

title: Little Krishna
subTitle: Krishna and Balram forge an unbreakable bond as brothers as they grow up in Vrindavan. Later, the brothers have to fight against the tornado demon, Trinavarta, sent by Kamsa to kill Krishna.

subTitle: The children are punished and given a assignment to complete. Later, Kanishk enlists the help of his devil friend, who possesses a mystical eraser.

title: Kris Roll No 21
subTitle: Kanishk summons the evil painter Ranga in order to defeat Kris. Now it is up to Kris to protect his friends from being trapped in the magical paintings that Ranga makes.

title: Kris Roll No 21
subTitle: Kris, Bablu and Kanishk contest the elections to become the class monitor. But while Kanishk has a demon attack Kris, Kris tries to rig the election to get more votes.

title: Kris Roll No 21
subTitle: Vrishchika, a scorpion lady from netherworld sends in hordes of bugs to seek revenge on Kris. But her plans fail when Dr J foolishly sends the kids on a bug collecting assignment.

title: Kris Roll No 21
subTitle: In order to become popular, Madhu creates an alter ego called Maddy. But when Kris is still the class favourite, Madhu and Dr J plan to have Maddy defeat Kris in a virtual simulation.

title: Kris Roll No 21
subTitle: After Kris wins a trip on a cruise, he asks his classmates to join him on this adventure. Meanwhile, Kanishk seeks the crab demon's support to defeat Kris.

title: Titoo
subTitle: An organisation dedicated to saving frogs convenes to elect their next president. Later, Titoo and his friends get entangled in communal disagreements regarding the presidential election.

title: Titoo
subTitle: Annoyed by a pesky mosquito, Titoo creates a spray repellent. His plan backfires when the spray unexpectedly mutates the insect into a human-sized monster.

title: Titoo
subTitle: After ditching school for a carnival, Titoo lies to Meva Uncle about searching for the abducted dog Aatmaram to avoid punishment.

subTitle: Titoo, an inspiring eight-year-old boy, wishes to help everyone in need. However, his attempts only get him into trouble.

title: Titoo
subTitle: At the society's painting competition, a power outage gives Shera an opportunity to cause mischief, but Titoo has plans of his own.

subTitle: Golu meets an alien that has disguised itself as a fly to exact its revenge on Kris. But when Golu brings the fly to school, Dr J confiscates it, ruining its chance to take revenge.

title: Kris Roll No 21
subTitle: Kanishk has Dr J steal Queen Moongila's diamond-studded tiara off of her. But when the queen finds her tiara missing, she suspects Kris and sends a force to retrieve it from him.

subTitle: On superhero day, teachers and students compete to come up with the best superhero costumes. But when the students start to win, chaos ensues as Kanishk's jealousy and rage get out of hand.

title: Kris Roll No 21
subTitle: Kanishk takes the children on a trip to the Sahara Desert. Here, he directs Kris and his friends to an abandoned area where a cactus demon, Nukeelasur, attacks them.

subTitle: The Fukrey gang promise to solve Murti sir's indigestion problem by going to a sumo wrestling competition, but the gang accidentally end up in a fight with a sumo wrestler.

subTitle: Choocha wins a parrot named Miyan Mitthu in a bet, but the parrot ends up causing trouble for the gang.

title: Fukrey Boyzzz
subTitle: Based on Choocha's dream, Hunny predicts that Choocha will be a great chef for the day. The boys manage Billu's shop for the day.

title: Kris Roll No 21
subTitle: After the school is infested with thousands of rats, Kanishk summons his magician friend Monty, to get rid of them and Kris.

title: Little Krishna
subTitle: Lord Brahma decides to test Krishna's powers by sending him and his friends to a happy paradise. But Krishna understands Lord Brahma's motives and tries to outsmart him and rescue his friends.

title: Haddi Mera Buddy
subTitle: While on a school trip to the museum, Grim is spotted by a ghost hunter named Hoss Delgado. Although at first Hoss wants to hunt Grim, he soon realises Billy and Mandy control him and so he backs off.

title: Little Singham
subTitle: To ace their upcoming math exam, Ajay and Lattu determine to help each other from falling asleep all night and study diligently.

title: Little Singham
subTitle: KC seizes a high mountain peak to mine a super-charged mineral. So, Little Singham must master high-altitude warfare to reclaim the peak and prevent an attack on major Indian cities.

title: Little Singham
subTitle: King Cobra obtains a special remote that can control all army vehicles. So, Little Singham joins Major Krishnan and his commandos on a dangerous jungle trip to retrieve it.

subTitle: When Simmba finds out that Ricky is being bullied by Amar, Akbar and Tony, he decides to intervene and give them a taste of their own medicine.

subTitle: While Simmba, Ricky and Kittu wait for Pillu Kaka to arrive, Nasty Ninja tries to steal an expensive jade locket from Pillu Kaka. So, Simmba sets out to catch Nasty Ninja before it is too late.

subTitle: The evil serpent king, Kaliya, contaminates the water with his deadly venom. So when the plants start to die and his friends start to get affected by the venom, Krishna vanquishes the demonic serpent.

title: Kris Roll No 21
subTitle: While the children look forward to going on a picnic, Kanishk asks his evil friend to make Kris sick. However, things take an unexpected turn when his plan fails.

subTitle: In order to buy a new television set, the children decide to raise funds through a music contest. Meanwhile, Kanishk summons his evil friend to destroy Kris.

subTitle: One of Kanishk's minions, Chhaya Maya, puts a spell on Pinky causing her to act strange. Later, Pinky approaches Kanishk to come up with a plan to defeat Kris.

subTitle: During the school's show-and-tell, Bablu brings an ancient armour and wears it in class. But the armour turns Bablu evil and gives him powers, forcing Kris to fight him.

subTitle: In order to terrorise the children at the school, Kanishk decides to have Besurdas, the demonic music teacher, switch places with Vasudev, the PT teacher.
